prompt: Using the uploaded image and without changing face, create a cinematic double-exposure portrait of the subject in side profile, seamlessly blending the silhouette with a futuristic metropolitan skyline filled with towering skyscrapers, glowing city streets, and tiny walking figures. Dress the subject in a premium black leather jacket while preserving every facial feature, hair detail, and expression. Use dramatic teal and amber color grading,soft urban bokeh, volumetric lighting, subtle fog, realistic reflections, and layered transparency to merge the city naturally into the body. Create a luxury editorial composition with a clean background, ultra-realistic textures, moody atmosphere, hyper-detailed architecture, masterpiece digital art, and stunning 8K photorealism.
promptEn: Using the uploaded image and without changing face, create a cinematic double-exposure portrait of the subject in side profile, seamlessly blending the silhouette with a futuristic metropolitan skyline filled with towering skyscrapers, glowing city streets, and tiny walking figures. Dress the subject in a premium black leather jacket while preserving every facial feature, hair detail, and expression. Use dramatic teal and amber color grading,soft urban bokeh, volumetric lighting, subtle fog, realistic reflections, and layered transparency to merge the city naturally into the body. Create a luxury editorial composition with a clean background, ultra-realistic textures, moody atmosphere, hyper-detailed architecture, masterpiece digital art, and stunning 8K photorealism.
promptZh: 使用上传的图像，在保持面部不变的前提下，为 主体 创作一张电影级的侧面双重曝光人像，将其剪影与 充满高耸摩天大楼、发光城市街道和微小行人身影的未来派都市天际线 无缝融合。为该主体穿上 高级黑色皮夹克，同时保留每一处面部特征、发丝细节和表情。采用青色与琥珀色的戏剧性调色、柔和的城市光斑、体积光、轻微雾气、逼真的反射，并通过分层透明度将城市自然地融入主体。打造一张具有干净背景、超逼真质感、情绪化氛围、超精细建筑细节、数字艺术杰作及震撼 8K 照片级真实感的奢华编辑风格构图。
